title: tanacetum kittaryanum
intro: Tanacetum kittaryanum, also known as Kittaryanum Tansy, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Armenia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Kittaryanum Tansy include relief from digestive problems, menstrual cramps, and anxiety, as well as its ability to act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Kittaryanum Tansy can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
